evidence.snippet: UK Specialists in the manufacture of custom cable assemblies and harnesses. Handling complexity from discrete wires to 1000 circuit looms.

St. Cross Electronics, established in 1979, is a leading UK specialist in the manufacture and supply of custom cable assemblies and wire harnesses. We provide the complete interconnect solution, supported by a comprehensive range of cable termination tooling, from automated robotic CNC machinery to intricate hand tools, ensuring precision across all project scales.

items.notes: Custom cable assemblies and wire harnesses — the company's entire business; cable assemblies/looms are the nearest match to mechanical_subsystems (cable carriers) in the category schema
RF cables service listed — used in drone antenna/data-link assemblies

St Cross Electronics
Unit 14, Mount Pleasant Industrial Park,

UK Specialists in the manufacture of custom cable assemblies and harnesses. Handling complexity from discrete wires to 1000 circuit looms.
Specialising in Defence, Medical, and Aerospace projects. Looms built to TYCO System 25 standards for high-reliability systems.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Manufactures custom cable assemblies, wire harnesses, military harnessing and RF cables — components that go into drone airframes and subsystems. Has a blog post specifically about UAVs/drones (not fetched). Customers include Cobham, BAE Systems, Thales.

products.notes: Product/service detail pages (services/*) were all skipped by the crawler; product names taken from navigation menu on homepage. Dedicated service pages would confirm specifications.

evidence.snippet: Unlock design efficiency via DFM. We scale production from prototypes to 100,000+ units using Komax automation.

We offer controlled scalability via our primary Southampton, UK manufacturing base. Our facility uses a rigorous Lean Manufacturing ethos, which is managed by our UK operations team. This site ensures cost-effective volume production of your cable assemblies and looms without compromising our UK-set quality standards.

readiness.notes: Explicitly scales from prototypes to 100,000+ units using Komax automation. Uses Lean Manufacturing with Komax CNC robotic machinery.

tagline: UK-based custom cable assembly and harness manufacturer serving defence, aerospace, and medical sectors. Produces wiring looms up to 1000 circuits, military-grade harnesses to TYCO System 25, RF cables, and ribbon assemblies; ISO 9001/14001/45001 certified with 100% electrical testing. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence confirms defence-sector customer base (BAE, Thales, Cobham) and recent UAV/drone positioning, but supply-chain clearance and current unmanned-systems contract details remain opaque.
